name: pspf
description: Local-first PSPF Core, Workshop, and Explorer validation slice.

scripts.check:gates: pnpm build && node scripts/check-schema-policy.mjs && node scripts/check-schema-coverage.mjs && node scripts/check-personal-data-exclusion.mjs && node scripts/check-brief-redaction.mjs && node scripts/check-ism-drift.mjs && node scripts/check-explorer-publication.mjs && node scripts/check-writer-lock.mjs && node scripts/check-integrity-scan.mjs && node scripts/check-sample-workspace.mjs && node scripts/check-package-shape.mjs && node scripts/backup-restore-dry-run.mjs && node scripts/check-accessibility.mjs
scripts.e2e:v0.8: pnpm build && node scripts/e2e-v01.mjs && node scripts/check-personal-data-exclusion.mjs && node scripts/check-integrity-scan.mjs && node scripts/check-sample-workspace.mjs && node scripts/check-package-shape.mjs
scripts.validate:debug-workspace: pnpm build && node scripts/validate-debug-workspace.mjs && node scripts/check-personal-data-exclusion.mjs
scripts.release:readiness: pnpm e2e:v0.4 && pnpm check:gates && pnpm validate:debug-workspace && pnpm lint && node scripts/release-readiness.mjs
